name: TimeCamp Time Tracking API
what_it_does: Automatic and manual time tracking platform with REST API — combining computer activity tracking, project time logging, billing rates, and invoicing for freelancers and teams, with extensive integrations (Jira, Trello, Asana, Slack) and desktop agents for automatic tracking.
use_cases: Querying time entries across projects for client invoice generation via API
Syncing TimeCamp time data to accounting or payroll systems
Monitoring team productivity metrics from computer activity tracking data
Creating project tasks and billing rates programmatically via API
Generating budget utilization reports from tracked time via API
not_for: Resource planning and capacity forecasting (use Float or Resource Guru)
Enterprise ERP time tracking with complex approval workflows
best_when: A freelancer or small team needs affordable time tracking with automatic computer activity logging, project budgets, and invoicing from a single tool with API access.
avoid_when: You need shift scheduling, complex resource planning, or enterprise-grade compliance for time data.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. Token passed in request header or query parameter. No OAuth2 or scopes — account-level access. API key per user with user's permission level. Request header preferred over query parameter for security.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: unlimited users, unlimited projects, basic time tracking
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic from $2.99/user/month; Pro from $4.99/user/month; Business from $7.99/user/month
pricing.notes: Generous free tier with unlimited users. Very affordable paid plans. Polish company (Warsaw). API on all plans including free. Desktop app for automatic tracking. Strong integration ecosystem (100+ integrations). 10,000+ companies.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly documented in detail

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for time entries, tasks, projects, users, and reporting. API key auth is simple. Webhook support for time entry events. API documentation is functional but not comprehensive. Free tier includes API access — good for testing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Time entry creation creates new records — not idempotent. Project and task management idempotent by ID. Read operations idempotent. Timer start/stop creates new entries.
known_agent_gotchas: API key in query parameter option is security risk — use header instead
Automatic tracking data (computer activity) vs manual time entries are separate
Task IDs reference internal TimeCamp tasks, not external PM tool tasks
Billing rates must be configured per project before generating invoices

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Polish company in EU. API key auth with query parameter option (security concern). No OAuth2 scopes. EU data residency. Standard SaaS security for affordable time tracking tool. API key in query param leaks in server logs — always use header.
